text_block_list.name: Tosen Jordan
text_block_list.text:
Oh man... I was texting my friends for so long last
night.

text_block_list.name: Tosen Jordan
text_block_list.text:
I swear those guys are, like, insane. They can talk
literally forever and never run out of things to
say.

text_block_list.name: Tosen Jordan
text_block_list.text: We talked so much. Anyway, they seem to be doing good. Yawwwn...

text_block_list.name: Monologue
text_block_list.text:
Although Tosen Jordan looks happy, she spends
the whole day half asleep.
